amend_directives.ruling: Amend 7.3 to reflect that all data will be stored exclusively on Australian soil, enhancing data security and sovereignty controls.
amend_directives.rationale: The user provided a specific data hosting constraint that mitigates security risks.

amend_directives.ruling: Amend 7.1 to note that data will be stored only on Australian soil, supporting compliance with privacy principles (such as those regarding cross-border data disclosures).
amend_directives.rationale: The user's commitment to onshore data storage is a key privacy control.

amend_directives.ruling: Draft section 6.5 to confirm that the system will be tested as a pilot with a small cohort prior to full deployment.
amend_directives.rationale: The user clarified that a pilot phase is planned, addressing the previously identified gap for section 6.5.
